name: Gradient Text
description: Gradient color flowing through headline text

name: Gradient Border
description: Animated gradient border around cards or sections
tailwind_css: bg-gradient-to-r from-primary via-accent to-secondary p-[1px] rounded-2xl [&>*]:bg-background [&>*]:rounded-2xl

name: Glassmorphism Card
description: Frosted glass card with backdrop blur
tailwind_css: bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-lg border border-white/20 rounded-2xl shadow-lg

name: Hover Scale
description: Subtle scale-up on hover for interactive elements

name: Hover Lift
description: Card lifts with enhanced shadow on hover

name: Scroll Reveal
description: Elements fade in and slide up as they enter viewport
tailwind_css: @keyframes fadeInUp { from { opacity:0; transform:translateY(20px) } to { opacity:1; transform:translateY(0) } } + IntersectionObserver

name: Staggered Animation
description: Sequential delay on grid items for cascade effect

name: Backdrop Blur Nav
description: Semi-transparent navigation with blur effect
tailwind_css: bg-background/80 backdrop-blur-lg border-b border-border/50 sticky top-0 z-50

name: Accent Line
description: Colored border accent on left or top of elements

name: Overline Label
description: Small uppercase label above headings for context
tailwind_css: text-xs uppercase tracking-wider font-medium text-primary mb-2

name: Text Reveal
description: Text characters or words appear sequentially
tailwind_css: @keyframes reveal { from { opacity:0; filter:blur(4px) } to { opacity:1; filter:blur(0) } } per-word delay

name: Parallax Subtle
description: Background moves at different speed than content on scroll

name: Magnetic Cursor
description: Elements subtly attract toward cursor on hover
tailwind_css: JS: element.style.transform on mousemove within threshold

name: Morphing Shape
description: SVG blob that continuously changes shape
tailwind_css: SVG animate or CSS @keyframes with border-radius transitions

name: Counter Animate
description: Numbers count up when scrolled into view

name: Typewriter Effect
description: Text appears character by character like typing
tailwind_css: CSS steps() animation or JS interval with cursor blink

name: Marquee Scroll
description: Continuous horizontal scrolling text or logos
tailwind_css: @keyframes scroll { from { transform:translateX(0) } to { transform:translateX(-50%) } } overflow-hidden

name: Image Reveal
description: Image revealed with sliding mask on scroll

name: Glow Effect
description: Subtle color glow behind elements

name: Noise Texture
description: Subtle grain overlay for depth and character
tailwind_css: before:content-[''] before:absolute before:inset-0 before:bg-[url('/noise.svg')] before:opacity-[0.03] before:pointer-events-none

name: Color Shift
description: Background gradient that slowly animates colors

name: Skeleton Loading
description: Content placeholder shapes that pulse while loading

name: Scroll Snap
description: Sections snap into place during scroll

name: Floating Element
description: Element gently bobs up and down continuously

name: Cursor Trail
description: Visual trail following cursor movement
tailwind_css: JS: spawn particles/dots on mousemove with opacity fade
